title: 4X MarkField Compatible Label Tape Replacement for Dymo Rhino 18445 19mm x 5.5m Industrial Vinyl Labels Self-Adhesive Tape for Rhino 4200 5200 6000 1000 3000 5000 ILP219, Black on White
features: MarkField Industrial Vinyl 18445 19mm Tapes Compatible with Dymo Rhino Labelling Machine. Size: 0.75 inches (19 mm) x 18 feet (5.5 m) Color: Black on White. Quantity: 4 Pack.
Compatible with DYMO Rhino 3000, Rhino 4200, Rhino 5000, Rhino 5200, Rhino 6000, ILP219, 3M-PL150, 3M-PL200, 3M-PL300 Printers.

Easy to peel off: the sticker on the back is divided into two parts to facilitate manoeuvring even for those who do not have nails! Leaves no trace when most surfaces are peeled off. Thanks to the thermal transfer printing technology, the label text will not stain or wipe or fade, and you do not have to worry about the stickiness of the label, it can be glued to many surfaces, even on rough, uneven surfaces.

DESIGNED TO LAST: MarkField 18445 19mm Rhino Industrial Vinyl Labels Industrial Strength Tape is suitable for indoor and outdoor use, even in harsh weather conditions. Withstand water, fade, corrosion, solvents, grease, heat, water and other aggressive elements without fading or peeling over time.

Industrial Vinyl 18445 3/4" label tapes: razor-sharp text and sharp black and white images without fading, smudging, leaking or defects, 19 mm flexible industrial vinyl label, widely used in industrial and commercial fields.
